---
title: "Week 7 — Introduction to Econometrics"
subtitle: "ECON 3209 · Kerala Agricultural University"
---

## Week 7 Overview

Understand what econometrics is, the types of economic data, and derive the simple OLS estimator from first principles.

| Lecture | Topic | Slides |
|---------|-------|--------|
| Lecture 1 | What is Econometrics? | [Open →](lecture-01.qmd) |
| Lecture 2 | Economic Data Types | [Open →](lecture-02.qmd) |
| Lecture 3 | Simple OLS Derivation | [Open →](lecture-03.qmd) |
